whatsNew: Every slide in every revision pack now includes a contextual learning image, including all Functional Skills Maths and English slides.
Trade revision images adapt to Bricklaying, Site Carpentry, Architectural Joinery and health-and-safety topics.
Maths visuals use measurement, money, budgeting, charts and real-world data contexts.
English visuals support reading, writing, proofreading, speaking, listening and discussion skills.
Revision images work offline, include accessible descriptions and open in a full-screen preview when tapped.
